title: Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) Guide
scenario: Create a PPE guide for general industry use. The guide should include a description of common types of PPE, instructions for selecting and using PPE, and guidelines for PPE maintenance and storage. The guide should be written in a clear and concise manner, using simple language and diagrams. The guide should be no more than 200 words and assume a general industry audience.
constraints: Must be no more than 200 words
Must use diagrams to illustrate PPE selection and use

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the guide adheres to the word count and diagram constraints.
Check if the guide is written in a clear and concise manner, using simple language.
Check if the guide includes accurate and relevant information about PPE selection, use, maintenance, and storage.
